job_description: Role: Marketing Assistant | Company: BrightPath Studio | Location: Melbourne | Entry-level role supporting market research, customer insight, social media content, campaign reporting, Excel analysis, and stakeholder communication. Responsibilities include preparing reports, coordinating content, and analysing campaign results. Preferred: digital marketing and dashboard experience.

Role: Business Analyst Intern | Company: Northstar Advisory | Location: Melbourne | Internship supporting requirements gathering, stakeholder interviews, Excel analysis, process improvement, reporting, and dashboard building. Assist with documenting business requirements and presenting findings. Preferred: Python, Power BI, and project coordination.

Role: Operations Assistant | Company: Harbour Goods | Location: Melbourne | Entry-level operations role coordinating schedules, maintaining reports, improving workflows, supporting customer service, and using Excel. Responsibilities include preparing weekly reporting and assisting cross-functional teams. Preferred: automation and data analysis.
